use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: use flat_map_iter to avoid intermediate nested allocations
fn expand_chunks(chunks: &[Chunk]) -> Vec<Item> {
    chunks.par_iter()
        .flat_map_iter(|chunk| {
            chunk.entries.iter().map(|entry| Item::from(entry))
        })
        .collect()
}

fn process_and_split(records: &[Record]) -> Vec<Output> {
    records.par_iter()
        .flat_map_iter(|record| {
            record.sub_records.iter().map(|sub| process_single(sub))
        })
        .collect()
}
